name: Microsoft AI Prompt Engineering Masterclass
description:
**Are you getting consistent, high-quality results from Microsoft 365 Copilot?**
Join us for a live, instructor-led session designed to help professionals use Copilot more effectively across Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, and Teams.
**Event Details:**
**Date:** June 04, 2026
**Time:** 12 PM- 2 PM ETD
**[Register Here For FREE](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/microsoft-ai-prompting-masterclass?advid=1315)**
You’ll learn practical prompting techniques, see real-world demos, and gain the confidence to apply Copilot effectively in your daily workflows
**NOTE: "ALL REGISTRATIONS WILL BE PROVIDED WITH DIGITAL ACHEIVEMENT BADGES ISSUED DIRECTLY FROM MICROSOFT"**
**What you will learn:**

* How Microsoft 365 Copilot fits into daily work and productivity
* Practical prompting techniques for Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook and Teams
* Ways to improve workflows using Copilot and AI-driven insights
* Best practices for collaboration and content creation with Copilot
* Q&A + Next Steps with the Instructor.

**[Register Today](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/microsoft-ai-prompting-masterclass?advid=1315)** and secure your spot - See You in the Masterclass

name: Systems for Sustainable Growth, with Danielle Neal
description: Ready to stop spinning your wheels and start building systems that actually support growth? Join ABWIPPM and Danielle Neal, founder of Cloven Marketing. Learn how to use AI and simple systems to streamline your workflow, stay consistent, and and grow without burnout.

name: Microsoft AI-Powered Security Masterclass for Nonprofits
description:
*Discover how AI is transforming healthcare delivery and patient outcomes?*
Join this masterclass to explore how Microsoft AI solutions are helping healthcare organizations improve efficiency, streamline clinical workflows, and deliver smarter, more personalized care.

**Date:** June 8, 2026
**Time:** 10AM- 12PM EST
**[Click Here to Register for the Session](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/microsoft-ai-masterclass-for-nonprofits?advid=1593&utm_source=microsoft_community&utm_medium=organic_social&utm_content=master_classes "https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/microsoft-ai-masterclass-for-nonprofits?advid=1593&utm_source=microsoft_community&utm_medium=organic_social&utm_content=master_classes")**

Learn how tools like Microsoft Fabric, Azure AI, Dragon, Microsoft 365, and Power Platform are enabling secure data integration, better collaboration, and operational innovation across the healthcare ecosystem.

**NOTE: "ALL REGISTRATIONS WILL BE PROVIDED WITH DIGITAL ACHEIVEMENT BADGES ISSUED DIRECTLY FROM MICROSOFT"**
**What you will learn:**

* Introduction & Overview: AI in Healthcare
* Managing and Integrating Health Data with Microsoft Fabric and Azure
* Improving Clinical Workflows with Dragon and AI Solutions
* Advancing Productivity with Microsoft 365 (Teams & PowerPoint)
* Enabling Innovation with Power Platform
* Q&A

\*\*[Register Today ](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/microsoft-ai-masterclass-for-nonprofits?advid=1593&utm_source=microsoft_community&utm_medium=organic_social&utm_content=master_classes "https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/microsoft-ai-masterclass-for-nonprofits?advid=1593&utm_source=microsoft_community&utm_medium=organic_social&utm_content=master_classes")\*\*and secure your spot - See You in the Masterclass!!

**[Register Now](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/AWS-discovery-day-agentic-ai-foundations?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=event&utm_campaign=aws_fy26_q2&utm_content=organic_listing&utm_term=sp)!**

This session offers valuable insights for professionals looking to stay ahead in the rapidly evolving AI landscape.

name: Microsoft Security Copilot Masterclass: AI in Cybersecurity
description:
Want to know how AI is transforming modern cybersecurity operations?
Discover how Microsoft Security Copilot uses AI-powered insights to simplify threat investigation, accelerate incident response, and improve Security Operations Center efficiency.
**Date:** June 11, 2026
**Time:** 10AM- 12PM EST
**[Click Here to Register for the Session](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/microsoft-copilot-for-security-masterclass?advid=1593&utm_source=microsoft_community&utm_medium=organic_social&utm_content=master_classes)**

Learn how tools like Microsoft Microsoft Security Copilot, Microsoft Defender, Microsoft Sentinel, Microsoft 365, and Microsoft Intune are enabling organizations to strengthen security operations, improve threat intelligence, automate incident response, and enhance collaboration across the cybersecurity ecosystem.

**NOTE: "ALL REGISTRATIONS WILL BE PROVIDED WITH DIGITAL ACHEIVEMENT BADGES ISSUED DIRECTLY FROM MICROSOFT"**
**What you will learn:**

* Introduction of Microsoft Copilot for Security
* Understanding Generative AI in Cybersecurity
* Key Features and Capabilities of Copilot for Security
* Using Copilot for Threat Detection and Investigation
* Improving Security Operations with AI-Powered Insights
* Q & A

**[Register Today](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/microsoft-copilot-for-security-masterclass?advid=1593&utm_source=microsoft_community&utm_medium=organic_social&utm_content=master_classes)** and secure your spot - See You in the Masterclass!!

name: The Retention ATM: Fix the Leaks Before You Lose Your Team
description: Are you leading a high-performing team — or quietly losing one? Join Dr. Tonicia Freeman-Foster as she reveals the everyday leadership habits that drain team trust and shows you exactly how to fix them.

name: Juneteenth Virtual Happy Hour
description: Grab your favorite drink and join us for a relaxed Juneteenth Virtual Happy Hour designed for connection and fun. Enjoy games, prizes, and easygoing networking with ABWIPPM members from across the association, all from the comfort of home.

name: The Users You’re Missing: Research Tips for Project Managers
description: Who are the users your project may be overlooking? Join Dr. Starlynne Gornail for a practical session on using human-centered research strategies to uncover unmet user needs and create more effective, trusted solutions.
